title: Google hit with $1 billion in fines as EU braces for Trump battle
summary: In a press release , the EC explained that the fines were due to Google “self-preferencing its own services on Google Search” ($522 million) and for anti-steering practices, like charging fees or restricting app developers from directing consumers to cheaper purchase options…
